Here we get nearly ten alternatives. We are lucky since

This view differs from the one given by Mantresvara in his

Find the sign occupied by Mandi and the lord of that sign.
(i) The lagna will be a trine to the signs of these two; (ii) or it ·
will be in the trines to their positions in Navarilsa; (iii) the
lagna at birth to the sign occupied by Gulika at birth. (iv) If

16 Rectification of Birth Time
the Moon is stronger, the lagna will be a trine to the position
of the Moon.
Mantresvara's view appears to be sounder. But we should
know how to calculate Mandi and Gulika.
When the duration of the day is thirty ghatis or twelve
hours, Mandi appears at the end of26, 22, 18, 14, 10, 6 and 2
.ghatis counted from Sunday onwards. 1f the duration is more
